message:
fix(plan): use saturating arithmetic for join budget composition

Join min_polls and parallelism used .sum() which wraps on u32
overflow. Changed to fold(0u32, u32::saturating_add) consistent with
BudgetEffect::sequential(). Added 2 regression tests (bd-2k6g1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
